hero.title: Where Pakistan’s Internet Is Headed
hero.subtitle: 5G, fiber, AI and rights frameworks will shape the next decade of participation and growth.

signals.title: Signals & Projections (2026–2030)
signals.desc: Conservative estimates based on regional trends and current baselines.

items.title: Nationwide fiber & IXPs
items.desc: Last mile fiber in metros & shared backhaul to tier 2 cities; local peering to lower latency.

items.title: 5G standalone pilots
items.desc: Campus networks, FWA for SMEs and industrial IoT sandboxes in ports and SEZs.

items.title: AI for public services
items.desc: Voice bots for citizen services, OCR for records, and AI triage in tele health.

items.title: Fintech & open payments
items.desc: Interoperable rails, QR ubiquity and SME credit scoring to lift digital commerce.

items.title: Skills & startup pipeline
items.desc: National micro‑credentials, cloud credits and working near campuses.

items.title: Rights & safety by design
items.desc: Transparent content rules, due process and data protection to build trust.

futures.title: Three Plausible Futures
futures.desc: Direction hinges on spectrum policy, investment and rights guarantees.

items.title: Green sprint
items.desc: Co‑ordinated spectrum + fiber capex, exports 11% GDP, costs fall; inclusion expands.

items.title: Patchy progress
items.desc: Selective metros thrive; second‑tier cities lag; affordability pressure persists.

items.title: Stalled momentum
items.desc: Regulatory risks delays 5G/fiber; talent churn rises; platforms de‑prioritize market.

roadmap.title: Near‑term Roadmap
roadmap.desc: Milestones any coalition (public, private, civil society) can rally around.

2025.title: Spectrum & peering
2025.desc: Finalize spectrum roadmap; expand IXPs in Karachi/Lahore/Islamabad.

2026.title: Fiber densification
2026.desc: Duct sharing policies; metro last‑mile pilots; open‑access wholesale.

2027.title: Campus networks
2027.desc: Campus networks in SEZs and ports; FWA for SME corridors.

2028.title: Gig tech at scale
2028.desc: AI‑assisted services; one‑stop citizen portals; data registries.

guardrails.title: Key Risks & Mitigations
guardrails.desc: Build guardrails early to maintain trust and investment.

items.title: Affordability squeeze
items.desc: Device financing and targeted data subsidies; promote competition.

items.title: Data protection gaps
items.desc: Pass + enforce DPA with independent oversight and breach notification.

items.title: Platform volatility
items.desc: Interoperable rails and local caching; predictable, consultative rule.

items.title: Skills shortage
items.desc: Micro‑credentials tied to employer demand; remote‑work infrastructure.

cta.text: Ready to shape the next decade? See how today's choices in policy and infrastructure ripple across jobs, services and rights.

footer.course: CMI040 Web Development — Internet in Pakistan
